title: Cost Tracking Policy
description: Validates ao_kernel/defaults/policies/policy_cost_tracking.v1.json (and any workspace override). Policy knobs cover catalog pointer, ledger pointer, strict-freshness gate, fail-closed-on-exhaust, and cost-aware routing enable flag. See docs/COST-MODEL.md.

enabled.description: Bundled default: false (dormant). Operator opt-in to activate cost tracking runtime.

price_catalog_path.description: Workspace-relative path to the price catalog override. Default '.ao/cost/catalog.v1.json'. Loader: if present + valid, used in place of bundled ao_kernel/defaults/catalogs/price-catalog.v1.json.

spend_ledger_path.description: Workspace-relative path to the append-only spend ledger JSONL. Default '.ao/cost/spend.jsonl'.

fail_closed_on_exhaust.description: MUST be true. CNS-007 fail-closed pattern: when a budget axis is exhausted, the next invocation is blocked and BudgetExhaustedError is raised.

strict_freshness.description: When false (default): a stale catalog (now > stale_after) emits a warn-level log but is still served. When true: stale catalog raises PriceCatalogStaleError and blocks cost-dependent invocations. CNS-028v2 iter-1 W1 absorb.

fail_closed_on_missing_usage.description: When true (default): adapter responses missing tokens_input/tokens_output trigger LLMUsageMissingError after ledger audit entry. When false: warn-log and continue (estimate stays reserved, no reconcile). Audit-only deployments with out-of-band billing reconciliation set false. PR-B2 v2 iter-2 B4 absorb.

idempotency_window_lines.description: Tail window (in lines) the ledger writer scans for (run_id, step_id, attempt) duplicates before append. Bounded for performance; operators with more than 1000 LLM calls per run can raise. PR-B2 v2 iter-2 B2 absorb.

enabled.description: When true (PR-B3 runtime), llm.resolve_route consults the price catalog to select the cheapest eligible model within the target class. When false, routing ignores the catalog.

priority.description: Selection strategy. 'provider_priority' (default, pre-B3 behavior) preserves llm_resolver_rules.fallback_order_by_class. 'lowest_cost' partitions providers into known-cost and unknown-cost buckets; if any provider has a catalog entry, sort ascending by price and drop unknowns; if none have catalog entries, fall back to original provider_priority without elimination.

fail_closed_on_catalog_missing.description: Active mode (enabled=true + priority=lowest_cost) + catalog load failure → RoutingCatalogMissingError. When false, falls back to provider_priority semantics with warn-log.
